subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the famous Rajput king during the Chauhan Dynasty?
question_hi: चौधरी जन्मजानेवाले राजपूत संतुलित करने के लिए
explanation_en: Maharana Pratap was the famous Rajput king who fought the Battle of Haldighati against the Mughals.
